checks.name: Organization model in schema
checks.evidence: schema.prisma:391-408 — Organization model with id, name, slug (unique), sport, logoUrl, customColors (Json?), inviteCode (unique), maxMembers, active, createdBy, timestamps, members relation. User has organizationId (FK with onDelete: SetNull) and organizationRole at lines 115-117, with index at line 120.

checks.name: POST /api/organizations endpoint
checks.evidence: organizations.ts:53-112 — POST / with Zod validation (CreateOrganizationSchema), generateUniqueCode, generateUniqueSlug, sets creator as admin (line 91), returns 201.

checks.name: Child cannot create org
checks.evidence: organizations.ts:53 — requireRole('parent') middleware blocks child role.

checks.name: Join organization endpoint
checks.evidence: auth.ts:601-672 — POST /api/auth/join-organization with requireAuth, Zod validation, invite code lookup, capacity check (line 646), sets favoriteSports from org.sport if user has none (lines 657-659).

checks.name: Join duplicate check (409)
checks.evidence: auth.ts:627-629 — checks user.organizationId, throws ConflictError (409).

checks.name: Invalid code format validation
checks.evidence: auth.ts:601-606 — JoinOrganizationSchema: z.string().length(6).regex(/^[A-Z0-9]{6}$/).

checks.name: Non-existent code returns 404
checks.evidence: auth.ts:636-637 — throws NotFoundError if org not found.

checks.name: Premium access via org (resolveEffectiveTier)
checks.evidence: subscription.ts:37-44 — checks user.organizationId first, queries org.active, returns 'premium' if active.

checks.name: Inactive org does not grant premium
checks.evidence: subscription.ts:43 — only returns 'premium' if org?.active is truthy.

checks.name: Member list returns safe fields only
checks.evidence: organizations.ts:216-226 — select: id, name, age, totalPoints, currentStreak, lastActiveDate, createdAt. No email, no parental info.

checks.name: Non-admin blocked from member list
checks.evidence: organizations.ts:204 — requireOrgAdmin middleware on GET /:id/members. Middleware at require-org-admin.ts:30 checks organizationRole === 'admin'.

checks.name: Activity dashboard with period param
checks.evidence: organizations.ts:317-440 — GET /:id/activity with period query param (7d/30d/all), aggregates ActivityLog by member IDs, computes summary (totalMembers, activeMembers, totals, averages), daily breakdown, top 5 members.

checks.name: Remove member clears org fields
checks.evidence: organizations.ts:254-280 — DELETE /:id/members/:userId sets organizationId: null, organizationRole: null. Blocks self-removal (line 259).

checks.name: Leave organization works for member
checks.evidence: organizations.ts:286-311 — POST /:id/leave sets organizationId: null, organizationRole: null for non-admin members.

checks.name: Admin cannot leave organization
checks.evidence: organizations.ts:299-301 — throws AuthorizationError if organizationRole === 'admin'.

checks.name: Regenerate invite code
checks.evidence: organizations.ts:187-198 — POST /:id/regenerate-code generates new code via generateUniqueCode(), updates org.

checks.name: Update organization (sport immutable)
checks.evidence: organizations.ts:146-181 — PUT /:id with UpdateOrganizationSchema that accepts name, logoUrl, customColors, maxMembers, active — 'sport' is NOT in the update schema, making it immutable.

checks.name: Rate limiting on join-organization
checks.evidence: index.ts:56 — app.use('/api/auth/join-organization', authLimiter) applies auth-tier rate limiting.

checks.name: Web dashboard page
checks.evidence: apps/web/src/app/organizations/page.tsx — renders org details (name, sport, invite code, copy button), activity summary via OrgActivitySummary, activity chart via OrgActivityChart, top members leaderboard, member list via OrgMemberList, settings modal via OrgSettings. Period selector (7d/30d/all) with tablist role.

checks.name: Web JoinOrgModal
checks.evidence: apps/web/src/components/JoinOrgModal.tsx — code input (uppercase, 6 chars), join button (disabled until 6 chars), cancel button, error handling for 404/409/403/400, success message, role='dialog' aria-modal='true'.

checks.name: Mobile JoinOrganization screen
checks.evidence: apps/mobile/src/screens/JoinOrganization.tsx — 6 TextInput refs with auto-advance (line 67), uppercase via autoCapitalize='characters' and toUpperCase() filter, backspace handling, haptic feedback, accessibilityLabel per input.

checks.name: i18n keys (org + a11y.org)
checks.evidence: en.json: 53 org.* keys (lines 907-961) + 9 a11y.org.* keys (lines 828-838) = 62 total. es.json: identical structure, 53 org.* + 9 a11y.org.* = 62 total. Both languages have matching keys.

checks.name: GDPR deletion handles org cleanup
checks.evidence: schema.prisma:116 — Organization relation uses onDelete: SetNull. users.ts:161 — prisma.user.delete removes user, the FK (organizationId) is on User itself, so deletion simply removes the user row. No orphaned references.

checks.name: invite-code.test.ts passes
checks.evidence: 20/20 tests passed — generateCode, isValidCodeFormat, generateUniqueCode, slugify, generateUniqueSlug.

checks.name: require-org-admin.test.ts passes
checks.evidence: 6/6 tests passed — no auth, no org ID, user not found, wrong org, member not admin, admin passes.

checks.name: organizations.test.ts passes
checks.evidence: 15/15 tests passed — full route coverage.

checks.name: subscription.test.ts passes
checks.evidence: 23/23 tests passed — includes org-based premium tier resolution.
